title: captures.json — operator paste export
description: Produced client-side by the html/progress.html 'Download captures.json' button; consumed by scripts/ingest_captures.py. No backend; this is a static download. Keys are endpoint dotted paths.

captures.description: Map of endpoint dotted path -> pasted capture.

endpoint.description: Dotted accessor, e.g. 'api.jobs.payment.add'. Mirrors the map key.

response_model.description: Response model name (without List[] wrapper), used to name the fixture file <Model>.json and to validate the paste.

request_model.description: Request model name if the endpoint takes a body; null/absent for GET.

response.description: Operator-pasted real response. Object or array when parseable JSON; string when the JS could not parse it (ingest then reports malformed per FR-013).

request.description: Operator-pasted real request body (optional). Same parse rules as response.
